case_title: JIAJING WU VS. DAVID CONG MA JR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARK: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. **PROOF OF SERVICE RECEIVED ##AFTER## MARCH 3, 2022 HEARING.** SERVED JAN-18-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MA JR, DAVID CONG
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF MARCH 3, 2022

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-11-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JIAJING WU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID CONG MA, JR. IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE BUT WAS EFFECTUATED. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $5727.28 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF TO BE MADE IN SIX PAYMENTS. THE FIRST PAYMENT OF $950 IS DUE ON THE 5TH OF APRIL AND SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS ARE DUE ON THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH. THE SIXTH AND FINAL PAYMENT ON SEPTEMBER 5TH WILL BE IN THE AMOUNT OF $977.28. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APR-11-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL CONTINUED FOR 3 MONTHS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE. PUNITIVE AWARD MAY BE CONSIDERED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,612.28 FILED BY WU, JIAJING AS TO DEFENDANT MA JR, DAVID CONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. FINAL CONTINUANCE. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-14-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF MARCH 3,2022. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUL-14-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR 3 MONTHS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE OF SEPTEMBER 5TH 2022. PUNITIVE AWARD MAY BE CONSIDERED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-14-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF MARCH 3,2022. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE OCT-14-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. THIS WILL BE THE FINAL CONTINUANCE PURSUANT TO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
